Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}All right, everyone. Today we have yet another transfer student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Is this really our third one? Guess that makes it a hat trick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}I'd appreciate it if you could show me the ropes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm pretty sure he's looking at me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}He was living overseas for a long time due to his parents' work.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}And that means he might not be familiar with all of our customs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Be sure to give him a hand if there's something he doesn't understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}That one's open. Up front, second from the left.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, um, Ms. Toriumi? That seat's taken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}You don't show up, you lose your seat. Have I not been clear about this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Life is just a game of musical chairs. Let that be a lesson to the rest of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I'm sorry, I didn't catch your name.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Dangerous? I haven't even asked you out to dinner yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 221 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Haha, rejected right off the bat. You're one interesting girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}You barely had time in the spotlight as the new kid, and now you have to share it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1581 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 3}Except right now, you should be paying attention to me. Hey, is anyone even listening?[n]{f 1 1}
